title: jmap blob download reflects stored content-type verbatim — same-origin XSS
description: handle_jmap_upload stores the raw Content-Type request header without validation. handle_jmap_download reflects the stored content-type as the response header. An authenticated caller can upload a blob with Content-Type: text/html then GET it, causing the browser to render it as HTML at the daemon origin (127.0.0.1:7734). Since the web UI is served at the same origin, the blob can read and exfiltrate the bearer token from any storage the UI uses. Fix: allowlist acceptable content-types on upload (or default to application/octet-stream), and force Content-Disposition: attachment on the download response.
